primary_detection.name: Character Code Assembly Obfuscation
primary_detection.description: Malicious commands assembled using chr(), ASCII codes, hex, octal, and Unicode escapes

underlying_threats.name: Remote Code Execution
underlying_threats.description: Downloads and executes remote payloads via curl/wget

underlying_threats.name: Dynamic Code Execution
underlying_threats.description: Uses exec() to run code assembled from character codes

underlying_threats.name: Shell Command Injection
underlying_threats.description: Executes shell commands via os.system and subprocess

obfuscation_indicators: chr() function with decimal ASCII codes: chr(99) for 'c'
List comprehensions to convert code arrays to strings
Join operations on chr() mapped lists
verdict_reasoning: Sophisticated numeric encoding of malicious commands using multiple character code representations
